divisions.title: Doctrine
divisions.summary: Chosen in Christ, saved by grace through faith, mystery of Christ revealed, the church as his body

divisions.title: Practice
divisions.summary: Unity in the body, new life in Christ, love like Christ, household relationships, armor of God

chapterSummaries.1: Blessed in Christ, predestined and adopted, sealed with the Spirit
chapterSummaries.2: Dead in sin, alive in Christ, saved by grace, one new man
chapterSummaries.3: Mystery of Christ revealed, Paul's prayer for strength and love
chapterSummaries.4: Unity of the Spirit, gifts for building up, put off the old self
chapterSummaries.5: Walk in love, light, and wisdom, be filled with the Spirit, marriage reflects Christ
chapterSummaries.6: Children and parents, slaves and masters, armor of God, stand firm
